session.assistant:
Perfect! All fast CI checks passed. Here's the summary:
**make fast-ci: PASSED - All checks successful**
**Results:** - **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1690 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: All matched files use Prettier code style - **Markdown Check**: Passed - **Exec Reference Check**: OK - reference.md is up to date - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5982 passed, 2 warnings (deprecation warnings in test code, not production code) - **Unit Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed - **Unit Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed - **Unit Tests (erk-mcp)**: Passed - **CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md pairing**: All 19 files properly paired, 0 violations
All checks are now passing after the prettier formatting was applied.
